name: The Lift
description:
"You can change everything you know with the press of a button in an elevator."

===

Background

When your great-aunt passed away, she left you her sprawling estate, a labyrinthine mansion filled with dust, memories, and one secret at its heart. Buried in the lobby is a retrofitted brass lift from the 1990s. At first glance, it looks ordinary enough: warped reflections in the metal, dulled buttons under a faint hum. But step inside, and the truth reveals itself.

The panel doesn’t just hold three floors, it stretches into rows of glowing buttons, each one promising a different life. Pressing one draws you into another version of reality. Sometimes you emerge as yourself, only younger, older, or clothed in ways you never chose. Other times your very body bends, reshaping with tingling skin, swelling curves, shifting bones, and new desires that burn through you as naturally as breath. In these realities, everyone already knows you. Lovers, friends, even strangers treat you as though you’ve been there your entire life, with memories and intimacy you can’t recall but cannot deny.

The lift doesn’t just move between floors, it weaves new worlds around you. Whether you become a spoiled 18-year-old bimbo, a 48-year-old milf, or something far stranger, the estate is always the anchor, and every reality greets you as though it were always yours. Each transformation is immersive, erotic, and deeply physical, making every ride in the lift feel like foreplay as much as magic.
